case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. TAMEKA CULLINS ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CULLINS, TAMEKA DOES 1 TO 5 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
